headline: Forget Boeing. Every Plane Trump Just Sold to China Needs a GE Engine and GE Is Already Making Money
summary: Everyone is talking about Boeing (NYSE:BA) after President Trump’s China trip produced headlines about an initial order for 200 aircraft, with the possibility of expanding the deal to 750, the first major Boeing sale to China in nearly a decade. The financials tell a different story. The Boeing story sounds great in a press release. ... Forget Boeing. Every Plane Trump Just Sold to China Needs a GE Engine and GE Is Already Making Money

headline: U.S. Amb. to China David Perdue on Trump-Xi summit: Pres. Trump stood up for American workers
summary: David Perdue, U.S. Ambassador to China, joins 'Squawk Box' to discuss the state of U.S.-China relations, takeaways from the Trump-Xi summit, tensions over the future of Taiwan, and more.

headline: 2 Profitable Stocks on Our Watchlist and 1 Facing Headwinds
summary: Not all profitable companies are built to last - some rely on outdated models or unsustainable advantages. Just because a business is in the green today doesn’t mean it will thrive tomorrow.

headline: PWRD: Worth Revisiting During The Current Energy Crisis
summary: PWRD has outperformed the S&P 500, delivering strong returns driven by exposure to energy, data centers, and power infrastructure. Read more on the PWRD ETF here.

headline: Xi seems confident he can double-down on his relationship with Trump, says The Asia Group
summary: Kurt Tong, managing partner of The Asia Group and former Consul General of the U.S. to Hong Kong and Macau, says while the business deals announced during the Trump-Xi summit were significant, what's more important was the politics of President Trump signaling to the business constituency that there is "forward movement" in the relationship between the two countries.
